name: Smooth Browser
examples_zh: 让 Smooth.sh 云端 AI 浏览器登录我的测试账户，按自然语言完成资料页更新，并保留持久 profile 供下次复用。
用 Smooth Browser 打开供应商门户，搜索指定订单号，提取订单状态、物流号和最近更新时间。
通过自然语言指令让云端浏览器填写一个多页调研表单，在提交前暂停并展示最终确认页。
examples_en: Have the Smooth.sh cloud AI browser log into my test account, update the profile page through natural-language instructions, and keep the persistent profile for reuse.
Use Smooth Browser to open the vendor portal, search for the specified order number, and extract status, tracking number, and last update time.
Instruct the cloud browser in natural language to fill a multi-page survey form, then pause on the final confirmation page before submission.
